signals.headline: [Context] Will Dogecoin reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026?
signals.raw:
No, there is no consensus that Dogecoin (DOGE) will reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026; prediction markets currently price the probability at around 35%, with forecasts ranging from bearish lows near $0.04 to optimistic highs above $0.20, depending on market momentum and technical breakouts.[2][6]

### Current Status and Price Context
As of early April 2026, DOGE trades around $0.09–$0.10, down from late 2025 peaks near $0.15–$0.16 and year-end levels around $0.12.[1][3][4][8] It has been consolid
